title: Happy Tree Friends - Client
description: This is the client-side modpack for HTF SMP server, so we can more easily share it and keep things updated.
body:
Modpack for our lil Happy Tree Friends SMP – _Season 2_.

## Resource Packs

_As of now all resource packs included in this modpack are optional._

### Fresh Animations

Included because .. well it makes mobs so cute!

### Optional Upgrades

Created using [vanillatweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/). This is just my personal list of go-to base visual tweaks.

<details>
<summary>What's included?</summary>

- Fixes And Consistency
  - Hoe Fix
  - Item Stitching Fix
  - Consistent Blank Decorated Pot
  - Pixel Consistent Ghast
  - Pixel Consistent Wither
  - Pixel Consistent Elder Guardian
  - Small Dripleaf Stem Fix
  - Big Dripleaf Stem Fix
  - Pixel Consistent Beacon Beam
  - Pixel Consistent Sonic Boom
  - Pixel Consistent Guardian Beam
  - Soul Soil Soul Campfire
  - Slime Particle Fix
  - Proper Break Particles
  - Don't Eat the Bowl!
- Fun
  - Spinning Skull on Fire Painting
  - Smiley Axolotls
  - Beeralis
- GUI
  - Dark UI
  - Transgender
  - Smooth Font
- Unobtrusive
  - Invisible Totem
  - Unobtrusive Rain
  - Unobtrusive Snow
  - Unobtrusive Particles
  - Lower Fire
  - Lower Shield
  - No Pumpkin Overlay
- Terrain
  - Bushy Leaves
- Parity
  - Bedrock Piston Arms
- 3D
  - 3D Chains
  - 3D Sugar Cane
  - 3D Fungi
  - 3D Lily Pads
  - 3D Stonecutters
  - 3D Mace
- Utility
  - Visual Waxed Copper (Items)
- Variation
  - Variated Villagers
- Aesthetic
  - Brown Leather
  - Animated Campfire Items
  - Accurate Spyglass
</details>

### Redstone Upgrades

Created using [vanillatweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/). This is just my personal list of go-to redstone-specific visual tweaks.

<details>
<summary>What's included?</summary>

- Utility
  - Redstone Power Levels
  - Visual Composter Stages
  - Visual Cauldron Stages
  - Visual Honey Stages
  - Visual Note Block Pitch
  - Directional Dispensers & Droppers
  - Directional Observers
  - Directional Hoppers
  - Sticky Piston Sides
</details>
